basic_details.job_title: OPaL Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Director and Managing Director Posts

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 45 years Maximum Age: 62 years Age relaxation rules are not specified in the provided data.

qualification.education_qualification: Engineering Graduate preferably in Chemical / Mechanical / Electrical / Production / Petrochemical Engineering, Graduate or Post-Graduate in Engineering / Chartered Accountant / Cost Accountant / Graduate with full time MBA/PGDBA
qualification.details: Director (Technical): Engineering Graduate preferably in Chemical / Mechanical / Electrical / Production / Petrochemical Engineering with good academic record from a recognized University/Institution. Additional qualification of MBA will be desirable. Managing Director: Graduate or Post-Graduate in Engineering / Chartered Accountant / Cost Accountant / Graduate with full time MBA/PGDBA from a leading Institute. Only Full Time Qualifications will be considered.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for OPaL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the OPaL recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the OPaL Director (Technical) and Managing Director posts is 30th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this OPaL recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the posts of Director (Technical) and Managing Director in this OPaL recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum age requirement for these OPaL posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for both the Director (Technical) and Managing Director positions is 45 years.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the OPaL Director and MD roles?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Director (Technical) and Managing Director posts is 62 years.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the Director (Technical) post?
faq.answer: For the Director (Technical) post, candidates need to be an Engineering Graduate, preferably in Chemical, Mechanical, Electrical, Production, or Petrochemical Engineering. An MBA is desirable.

faq.question: Q6. What qualifications are needed for the Managing Director position at OPaL?
faq.answer: The Managing Director role requires a Graduate or Post-Graduate in Engineering, or a Chartered Accountant, Cost Accountant, or a Graduate with a full-time MBA/PGDBA from a leading institute.

faq.question: Q7. How can candidates apply for the OPaL recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply by sending their complete application via email to the official email address provided in the notification before the deadline.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this OPaL recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any specific application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for confirmation.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for these OPaL positions?
faq.answer: The job type for the Director (Technical) and Managing Director posts in this OPaL recruitment is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Which city is the OPaL recruitment based in?
faq.answer: The OPaL recruitment is based in Vadodara, Gujarat.
